The species Gomphocarpus praticola is a type of milkweed vine native to South Africa. This plant is often found in dry, rocky areas and is known for its bright orange flowers. Within the Apocynaceae family, Gomphocarpus praticola is closely related to the more commonly known Asclepias genus.
